headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Intel (INTC) After A 140% Year To Date Surge
summary: If you are asking whether Intel's current share price still offers value or if most of the easy gains are already gone, this article is designed to help you frame that question clearly. Intel's share price recently closed at US$94.48, alongside returns of 14.5% over 7 days, 96.7% over 30 days, 139.9% year to date, 358.2% over 1 year, 211.1% over 3 years, and 79.0% over 5 years. These figures may prompt you to reassess both upside potential and risk. Recent coverage has focused on Intel's...
